title: Fleet Snapshot Response
description: Shape of the GET /api/fleet/snapshot response. version=1. All fields are observed Git facts; no derived analysis is included.

version.description: Schema version. Breaking changes require a new endpoint path and a deprecation window.

snapshotAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the snapshot was collected.

window.description: Observation window passed as the ?window query parameter (default: 24h).

repos.description: One entry per repo in the allowlist (or per include= filter). Order matches RTGV_REPOS declaration order.

repoId.description: The RTGV_REPOS key (allowlist ID) for this repository.

headShortSha.description: Short SHA of HEAD (git rev-parse --short HEAD). Null when status != ok.

commits24h.description: Number of commits in the last 24 hours (git log --since). Null when status != ok.

refMove1h.description: True if any ref changed objectname within the last 1 hour, as observed via SSE events. Null when status != ok.

worktreeDirty.description: True if the working tree has uncommitted changes (git diff --quiet HEAD). Null when status != ok.

lastEventAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent ref or commit event observed. Null when no event has been observed.

status.description: Observed result status for this repo. ok = all facts collected. timeout = git command exceeded RTGV_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS. git_error = git exited non-zero. missing = repo path no longer exists. unauthorized = access denied.

estimatedCost.description: Literal cost figures for the user to predict load on their machine. No adjectives.

subscribedRepoCount.description: Number of repos included in this snapshot (after include= filter).

snapshotIntervalMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds at which the UI refreshes this snapshot.

gitCallsPerMin.description: Estimated git invocations per minute across all subscribed repos.

notes.description: Informational flags about snapshot collection behavior.

untrackedExcluded.description: True if untracked files were not considered when computing worktreeDirty (git diff only, no ls-files).

sseAvailable.description: True if the fleet SSE endpoint is available for live ref-event push.
